prompt: Edit image 1: Introduce the photorealistic penguin from image 2, having it swim gracefully amidst the water lilies in the foreground. prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Introduce the photorealistic penguin from image 2, positioned swimming gracefully amidst the water lilies in the mid-foreground, slightly to the left of center. Replace the existing modern cityscape background of image 1 with the architectural blend of traditional and modern buildings from image 3, specifically integrating the distinctive traditional pavilion structure and the surrounding modern high-rises. Crucially, retain the original sky and the prominent upper architectural structure (the concrete overhang) of image 1 above the newly integrated background. Additionally, incorporate the tall, dense reeds from the foreground of image 3 along the water's edge in the middle ground of image 1, situated behind the water lilies. The final output should be a photorealistic image that uniquely blends urban and natural elements.
objects: photorealistic penguin swimming gracefully amidst the water lilies in the mid-foreground, slightly to the left of center
distinctive traditional pavilion structure from image 3
